overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a fantasy RPG showing a wizard character exploring a gothic castle dormitory and adjacent bathroom. The character moves through dimly lit stone rooms with warm sconce lighting, transitioning from a bedroom with four-poster beds to a large communal bathroom with vintage fixtures.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic dormitory bedroom with four-poster beds and writing desk

agents.ego_description: walking around the dormitory room examining the furniture, bed, and desk area

entered.detail: tall wooden bed with green curtains and a ladder
oval wooden desk with papers and books scattered on top
large ornate mirror with golden frame mounted above the desk
tall arched window with stone frame showing dark night outside
tall dark wooden cabinet with multiple compartments

segments.scene_description: The character explores a dimly lit gothic dormitory room with stone walls and warm sconce lighting. A four-poster bed with green curtains dominates the space, while a wooden writing desk with an ornate oval mirror sits against the right wall. The character walks around examining the furniture and approaches the exit door.

events.description: character exits the dormitory room into a narrow stone corridor
character opens a large carved wooden door and enters the bathroom

agents.ego_description: walking through the stone corridor and opening the door to enter the bathroom

entered.detail: stone stairs with wooden handrail leading downward
large ornate wooden door with metal studs and carvings
rough stone block walls with wall-mounted sconces

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a narrow stone corridor with rough-hewn walls and warm lighting. A stone staircase with a wooden handrail is visible to the right. The character approaches and opens a large carved wooden door, transitioning into a new space.

scene_state.functional_zone: large circular bathroom with vintage sinks and bathtubs

events.description: character opens a green wooden stall door and looks inside

agents.ego_description: walking through the bathroom examining the sink row, opening a stall door, and inspecting the bathtub area

entered.detail: curved row of porcelain sinks with brass faucets and wooden cabinets below
large cylindrical stone column with red banding supporting the ceiling
row of green painted wooden toilet stall doors with ventilation slats
vintage white bathtub with blue base and red shower curtains
patterned stone tile flooring in green and beige hexagons

segments.scene_description: The character enters a spacious circular bathroom with hexagonal floor tiles and warm overhead lighting. A curved row of vintage porcelain sinks lines the left wall, while a large central stone pillar dominates the middle of the room. The character explores past green wooden stalls to the bathtub area with clawfoot tubs and hanging curtains, then turns back toward the sinks.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dimly lit gothic bedroom through a narrow passage and into a spacious communal bathroom. It begins by exploring a dormitory room with stone walls and warm sconce lighting, moving past a green-curtained four-poster bed and an ornate oval mirror before approaching the exit. As the character leaves the room, the scene shifts into a narrow stone corridor with rough-hewn walls and a wooden staircase, leading directly toward a large carved wooden door. The camera then passes through this doorway to reveal a circular bathroom featuring hexagonal floor tiles and a massive central stone pillar. Finally, the view glides past a row of vintage porcelain sinks and green wooden stalls toward a series of clawfoot tubs before turning back toward the washing area.
